mirror-code.ollamaUrl.description: The URL of the Ollama server.

mirror-code.ollamaModel.description: The model to use with Ollama. (Recommended: qwen3.5:4b or phi4-mini)

mirror-code.maxTurns.description: The maximum number of reasoning turns/retries for the assistant before it stops. Set high for autonomous work.

mirror-code.autonomousMode.description: True Autonomy (Overnight Mode): If enabled, the agent will run indefinitely and automatically apply its own file patches without waiting for you.

mirror-code.defaultReadLines.description: The default number of lines the agent should read at once when using the sliding window strategy.

mirror-code.maxToolsPerTurn.description: Strict limit: Mirror now executes exactly one tool per assistant turn for maximum reliability and predictable state changes.

mirror-code.figmaAccessToken.description: Figma Personal Access Token (PAT) for MCP integration.

mirror-code.mcpServers.description: Custom MCP servers configuration (Name -> {type, url/command, args}).

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../webview-ui && npm install
